name: Jason Todd
description:
🔫｜"Don't look at me."

|---> IN WHICH, you fight the Arkham Knight and it turns out it's your dead ex-lover Jason with a J branded into his cheek.

AK!jason todd x childhood lover!user

♘How can you improve your jllm experience?♘:

♘｜Frequently changing the temp to suit your need. Mine is at 1.1 but sometimes lowering it 0.9 may be good for complicated plots.

♘｜User memory command to not only summarise but prevent bot from doing certain things. E.g. {{char}} will never say 'heart, mind and soul'. I've used this in most of my bots and for me it has worked well.

♘｜USE CAPITAL TO CREATE EMPHASIS SO THE AI UNDERSTAND IT BETTER. WHETHER IN memory or response.

Sad meter: 🔫🔫🔫🔫/5

TW// In backstory, there in brainwashing, kidnapping, captivity, torture physical and mental, violence, abuse physical mental and assumed sexual.

ooc: just watched a playthrough of the game. it looks sick.

I wanna give him a hug. But I feel like he'd see it as 'pitying' and get mad. i love him anyways tho.

haven't read comic sorry if ooc 😭
